title: Bitcoin miner 'capitulation' comes as trader sees later 2026 bear-market bottom

briefing: SpaceX’s IPO hype may fuel a strong debut, but history shows richly valued listings often struggle after the first-day pop fades.

title: Crypto scammers exploit World Cup ticket demand, TRM warns
summary: Crypto scammers exploit World Cup ticket demand, TRM warns
briefing: FIFA and the FBI warned of ticket scams as TRM Labs identified World Cup-themed crypto fraud operations tied to multiple wallet addresses.

title: International sting shuts down $390M crypto money-laundering ring
summary: International sting shuts down $390M crypto money-laundering ring
briefing: Eleven countries were involved in the joint operation that ended the AudiA6 crypto laundering ring and Dark2Web marketplace.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: SEC plan to scrap ‘Rule 611’ positive for tokenized US stocks: Galaxy
summary: SEC plan to scrap ‘Rule 611’ positive for tokenized US stocks: Galaxy
briefing: Galaxy’s Alex Thorn says a plan to scrap rules on stock orders and quotes would remove a major barrier to tokenized stocks trading on decentralized platforms.

summary: LG, Arbitrum launch blockchain-based bid in $679B ad market
briefing: LG is building a blockchain focused on buying and selling ads, joining a wave of companies launching their own blockchains in recent years.

summary: Coinbase launches tool letting AI agents make payments and trade crypto
briefing: Coinbase for Agents will allow users of the crypto exchange to manage their holdings without "constant manual oversight,” autonomously performing a range of tasks.

summary: Gary Gensler Backs States in Fight Over Prediction Market Regulation
briefing: The former SEC and CFTC chair says Congress "categorically" did not intend to put sports betting under exclusive federal oversight.

summary: LG Electronics Teams With Arbitrum for Blockchain-Based Ad Platform
briefing: The South Korean tech giant built a custom layer-2 network with Arbitrum for an advertising platform set to launch this year.

summary: OpenAI Wants a Price War With Anthropic—Is It Proving DeepSeek Right?
briefing: Sam Altman is weighing drastic token price cuts to fight Anthropic. The problem is DeepSeek already made that argument for him—and for free.

title: Bitcoin Must Prepare for Quantum Threat Now, Coinbase Says
summary: Bitcoin Must Prepare for Quantum Threat Now, Coinbase Says
briefing: Coinbase's quantum advisory council says crypto developers should begin post-quantum migration work now, warning that unresolved questions around abandoned and vulnerable coins could become one of Bitcoin's biggest battles.

summary: Ripple CEO Takes Aim at JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon Over Clarity Act Crypto Bill Criticism

title: Microsoft President Asks Graduates to Stop Fearing AI and Start Adapting
summary: Microsoft President Asks Graduates to Stop Fearing AI and Start Adapting
briefing: Brad Smith published a 3,000-word essay urging empathy for graduates booing AI at commencements. The same week, Microsoft's CFO confirmed headcount will keep shrinking.

summary: Nasdaq-Listed Bitcoin Firm Nakamoto Sells BTC, Cuts Debt and Authorizes Share Buyback
briefing: Nakamoto, the Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin services and treasury firm, sold about $48 million worth of BTC and derivatives to help reduce debt.
